introSection: Fujin Raijin II (Japanese: йўЁзҐћй›·зҐћII) was a TOGO standup roller coaster that previously operated at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White track and supports. One train was light red, the other was light blue.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: In 2007, a 19-year old-college student died after a broken wheel axle on the blue train caused a car to flip dragging her head on the catwalk's railing for the brake run.

fullText:
Fujin Raijin II (Japanese: йўЁзҐћй›·зҐћII) was a TOGO standup roller coaster that previously operated at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan.



White track and supports. One train was light red, the other was light blue.



In 2007, a 19-year old-college student died after a broken wheel axle on the blue train caused a car to flip dragging her head on the catwalk's railing for the brake run.
